message:
test(stdio_abi): expand stdio test coverage from 40 to 54 tests

Cover popen/pclose, perror, fputs_unlocked/fgets_unlocked, fwrite_unlocked/
fread_unlocked, fflush_unlocked, clearerr_unlocked, feof_unlocked,
ferror_unlocked, fileno_unlocked, fseeko/ftello, setbuffer, putw/getw,
tmpfile64, fmemopen, vsnprintf truncation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
